name: yxhpy-codex-extensions
description: Public catalog of optional Codex plugins, skills, and MCP-oriented tools.

plugins.name: task-gate
plugins.summary: Plan raw prompts into numbered tasks before Codex executes. Includes MCP server and codex_gate wrapper.

skills.name: agy-frontend
skills.summary: Frontend workflow skill that routes implementation through the Antigravity CLI and requires local verification.

mcps.name: task-gate
mcps.summary: MCP stdio server exposed by the task-gate plugin.
